title: How to change Language?
excerpt:
Hi! 
When I created my monday.com account, it was all in Russian, but I hoped I could change the language later in settings. Unfortunately I con’t find where I can make the change to English. 
How do I do it? 
Thank you …

posts.author: matrenitski (Max matrenitski)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

When I created my monday.com account, it was all in Russian, but I hoped I could change the language later in settings. Unfortunately I con’t find where I can make the change to English.
How do I do it?

Thank you in advance!h

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @matrenitski

You can change the language from the My Profile:

Screen Shot 2019-08-18 at 12.04.02.png1252×414 56.6 KB

Let me know if you have any issue locating it!

Cheers,
Julia
